requirement_topic.zh: 中国 GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 基线对照
requirement_topic.zht: 中國 GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 基線對照

summary.en: For Oman, the China technical baseline should be translated into an Oman-facing crosswalk rather than treated as direct approval. The crosswalk should map China inverter performance, grid-support, anti-islanding, protection, safety, labeling, manual, and commissioning evidence to DGSM / MoCIIP standards screening, IEC 62109 evidence, OPWP / OETC / Nama grid review, and Sahim rooftop requirements where applicable.
summary.zh: 对于阿曼，应将中国技术基线转化为面向阿曼的对照表，而不是视为直接批准。对照表应将中国逆变器性能、并网支撑、防孤岛、保护、安全、标签、说明书和调试证据映射到 DGSM / MoCIIP 标准筛查、IEC 62109 证据、OPWP / OETC / Nama 并网审查以及适用时的 Sahim 屋顶光伏要求。
summary.zht: 對於阿曼，應將中國技術基線轉化為面向阿曼的對照表，而不是視為直接批准。對照表應將中國逆變器性能、併網支撐、防孤島、保護、安全、標籤、說明書和調試證據映射到 DGSM / MoCIIP 標準篩查、IEC 62109 證據、OPWP / OETC / Nama 併網審查以及適用時的 Sahim 屋頂光伏要求。

standards_or_laws: DGSM / MoCIIP standards route for the product scope
Sahim rooftop solar requirements where applicable

summary.en: The common China baseline includes GB/T 37408-2019 for grid-connected PV inverter technical requirements and GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station access to the power system. NB/T 32004-2018 and utility-specific acceptance records may also appear in Chinese files. These are useful starting points but are not Oman approvals.
summary.zh: 常见中国基线包括并网光伏逆变器技术要求 GB/T 37408-2019，以及光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 GB/T 19964-2024。NB/T 32004-2018 和电网公司特定验收记录也可能出现在中国文件中。这些是有用起点，但不是阿曼批准文件。
summary.zht: 常見中國基線包括併網光伏逆變器技術要求 GB/T 37408-2019，以及光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定 GB/T 19964-2024。NB/T 32004-2018 和電網公司特定驗收記錄也可能出現在中國文件中。這些是有用起點，但不是阿曼批准文件。

standards_or_laws: State Grid or China Southern Power Grid project acceptance records where applicable

gap.en: Build a clause-by-clause matrix that identifies accepted evidence, missing Oman evidence, edition mismatches, model-family gaps, firmware-setting gaps, label and manual gaps, and project-commissioning evidence that must be generated locally.
gap.zh: 应建立逐条款矩阵，识别已接受证据、缺失的阿曼证据、版本不一致、型号系列缺口、固件参数缺口、标签和说明书缺口，以及必须在当地生成的项目调试证据。
gap.zht: 應建立逐條款矩陣，識別已接受證據、缺失的阿曼證據、版本不一致、型號系列缺口、韌體參數缺口、標籤和說明書缺口，以及必須在當地生成的專案調試證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as a practical due-diligence deliverable where the Oman buyer, EPC, lender, insurer, utility, or project owner asks how China evidence maps to Oman requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 are China baseline standards and do not by themselves create Oman market access or grid approval

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation / Standardization Administration of China public standards platform

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB/T 37408-2019 and GB/T 19964-2024 as a China baseline, then map them to Oman standards, safety, grid, rooftop, settings, and commissioning requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可将 GB/T 37408-2019 和 GB/T 19964-2024 作为中国基线，再映射到阿曼标准、安全、并网、屋顶光伏、参数和调试要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可將 GB/T 37408-2019 和 GB/T 19964-2024 作為中國基線，再映射到阿曼標準、安全、併網、屋頂光伏、參數和調試要求。
